title: Mazhakaatha Lyrics Oru Oorla Rendu Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Mazhakaatha Suththi Adikka Lyrics
Singer(s): Haricharan, Vandhana Srinivasan, Maria Roe Vincent
Lyrics: Yugabharathi

Mazhakaatha suththi adikka
nenjukulla minnal adikkudhadi.
adhirr vaettaa nee enna vedikka
kannukulla sanda nadakkudhadaa.

nee sollura sollulla thaaney
kadun kaththiri veyilu naaney
kulir aanaen.

Nee siyura anbula thaanae
pani kottura panguni naanae
pachcha neruppaanen viruppaanen
sevappaanen.

Mazhakaatha suththi adikka
nenjukulla minnal adikkudhadi.
adhirr vaettaa nee enna vedikka
kannukulla sanda nadakkudhadaa.

Manasu solluradha odambu kaettka
marandhu poyidudhey una naan paakka
moochu kaathtthaa, unakkul poondhaen.
kaalam pooraa iruppaen serndhae

allikoduthida anbu irukkayil
uzhagae pudhusaachu
innu edhukku nee vanbu
valakkura thodavaa

Mazhakaatha suththi adikka
nenjukulla minnal adikkudhadi.
adhirr vaettaa nee enna vedikka
kannukulla sanda nadakkudhadaa.

Azhagaa puththagamaa pozhudhum vaasi
kadaisi pakkam vara mulusaa naesi.
paavi neethaan edhayo paesi
kelvi kaettaa sariyaa yosi

Vandha vazhiyila sellum varayila
payanam mudiyaadhu.
Nammbi nadandhida undhan
nizhaula thodarvaen.

Mazhakaatha suththi adikka
nenjukulla minnal adikkudhadi.
adhirr vaettaa nee enna vedikka
kannukulla sanda nadakkudhadaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mazhakaatha?

The song Mazhakaatha expresses the feelings of love and affection, portraying the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie Oru Oorla Rendu Raja?

In Oru Oorla Rendu Raja, this song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of Mazhakaatha?

The song is sung by Haricharan and Vandhana Srinivasan, whose voices beautifully complement each other.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mazhakaatha was composed by D Imman, known for his melodious tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was Mazhakaatha released?

The song was released on November 8, 2014, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mazhakaatha, the singers convey a heartfelt expression of love, making it a perfect romantic melody. The song plays a significant role in Oru Oorla Rendu Raja, capturing the essence of the lead characters' relationship. With soothing tunes and poetic lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and warmth. The collaboration of talented artists brings a unique charm, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's romantic songs.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhakaatha from the movie Oru Oorla Rendu Raja is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With enchanting melodies by D Imman and heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The collaboration between talented singers Haricharan and Vandhana Srinivasan adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The heart is struck by lightning, it feels like a storm inside. Why are you causing a commotion in my eyes?
What you say is true, I am the one who is cool like a breeze.
You are the love that brings joy, I am the one who is green like fire, I am eager and passionate.
The heart forgets what the body says, I am lost in your gaze, I am inside you, time will pass as we unite.
Love has become something new, why did you come to disturb it?
I will give myself to you.
Beauty is like a new book, it comes to the end with a complete story. You are the sinner, did you speak something and ask if it’s right?
On the path you came, the journey cannot end. I will continue to walk with your true essence.
If you are here, I will come in a big way.
